# Keyboard Shortcuts

<!-- This file is generated from shortcuts.json by tools/gen-shortcuts.ps1. Do not edit directly. -->

## General

| Keys | Description |
|---|---|
| `F1` | Show keyboard shortcuts |
| `Ctrl+L` | Toggle filter on/off (does not open the flyout) |
| `F11` | Toggle full screen |
| `Shift+F` | Toggle full screen (image only) mode (full screen + hide left pane/status bar + immersive) |
| `Esc` | Exit full screen modes (clears the selection set if any) |

## View

| Keys | Description |
|---|---|
| `Click` | Toggle fit ‚áÑ zoom on the main image (centered on the click position) |
| `Double-click` | Show the main image at 100% (centered on the click position) |
| `Drag` | Pan (move the view) |
| `Wheel` | Stepped zoom (centered on the cursor) |
| `+ / -` | Stepped zoom in/out |
| `Z` | Toggle fit ‚áÑ zoom (zoom restores the last magnification/position) |
| `Shift+Z` | Show at 100% (1:1 pixels) |
| `Shift+Alt+‚Üê / ‚Üí` | Fit / 100% |
| `F` | Toggle immersive view (collapses the right panel/filmstrip) |
| `I` | Toggle the metadata overlay |
| `E` | Toggle the right panel between the loupe and EXIF details |
| `G` | Cycle the composition grid type (none ‚Üí center cross ‚Üí rule of thirds ‚Üí squares) |
| `Shift+G` | Toggle the composition grid reference (image ‚áÑ canvas) |
| `C` | Toggle the prefetch cache overlay (debug) |

## Navigation

| Keys | Description |
|---|---|
| `‚Üê / ‚Üí` | Go to the previous/next photo (focus moves to the filmstrip) |
| `Double-click` | Filmstrip: return to the grid view |
| `PageUp / PageDown / Home / End` | Move within the filmstrip |
| `Alt+‚Üê / ‚Üí / ‚Üë / ‚Üì` | Pan the image |
| `Alt+F` | Scroll to the AF focus point |
| `Ctrl+Alt+‚Üê / ‚Üí` | Scroll the loupe horizontally |
| `Ctrl+Alt+‚Üë / ‚Üì` | Scroll the loupe vertically (bulk flag when a selection set exists) |
| `Ctrl+Alt+F` | Move the loupe to the AF focus point |

## Rating

| Keys | Description |
|---|---|
| `0 ‚Äì 5` | Rating (applies to the focused photo only) |
| `6 / 7 / 8 / 9` | Color label (red / yellow / green / blue) |
| `P` | Color label (purple) |
| `[ / ]` | Increase/decrease the rating |
| `Ctrl+‚Üë / ‚Üì` | Flag (accept / reject) |

## Multi-select

| Keys | Description |
|---|---|
| `Shift+‚Üê / ‚Üí` | Range selection (from the pivot to the focus) |
| `Ctrl+‚Üê / ‚Üí` | Move the focus only (selection set unchanged) |
| `Ctrl+Space` | Add/remove the focused photo to/from the selection set |
| `Ctrl+A` | Select all (add every filtered photo to the selection set) |
| `‚Üê / ‚Üí (with selection)` | Cycle the focus among the selected members |
| `Esc` | Clear the selection set |
| `Alt+0 ‚Äì 5` | Bulk rating (all members of the selection set) |
| `Alt+6 ‚Äì 9 / Alt+P` | Bulk color label (all members of the selection set) |
| `Ctrl+Alt+‚Üë / ‚Üì` | Bulk flag (all members of the selection set) |
| `Ctrl+Click` | Move focus to the clicked photo and toggle it in/out of the selection set (grid/film strip) |
| `Shift+Click` | Range selection (from the pivot to the clicked photo; grid/film strip) |

## File actions

| Keys | Description |
|---|---|
| `Ctrl+E` | Show in Explorer (the focused photo) |
| `Alt+E` | Open with the default app (all selected files when multiple are selected) |
| `Ctrl+Alt+E` | Copy the path (all selected files, one per line, when multiple are selected) |
| `Alt+S` | Share (the exe set in Settings, or the standard share sheet if unset; all selected files when multiple are selected) |
